definition:
1. care, attention , (Hesiod); μ. πλεόνων care for  many things, (Hesiod); ἔργων μ. attention  to action, (Thucydides):—;but with genitive subjecti, care paid  by one, θεῶν του μελέτῃ (Sophocles Tragicus) 
2. practice, exercise , Lat. meditatio, (Pindar); ἡ δι᾽ ὀλίγου μ. their short practice , (Thucydides); πόνων μελέται painful  exercises, of the Spartan discipline, (Thucydides) 
3. in a military sense, exercise, practice, drill , (Thucydides) 
4. of an orator, rehearsal , (Demosthenes Orator) 
5. a pursuit , (Pindar) 
6. care, anxiety , μελέτῃ κατατρύχεσθαι (Euripides) (ML)
